_enabled: Master switch — when false, this plugin is skipped during indexing and Python files fall through to the generic text indexer.
_extensions: File extensions this plugin claims (lower-case, leading dot).
_extract_comments: Extract `# TODO`-style comment nodes from each file.
_comment_tags: Tags surfaced as comment nodes when `extract_comments` is true.
_extract_strings: Capture string literals as `string` nodes (useful for full-text search).
_extract_type_checking_imports: Also walk `if TYPE_CHECKING:` import blocks (otherwise skipped at runtime).
_detect_patterns: Annotate files with framework patterns (FastAPI, Django, …) inferred from imports.
_known_patterns: Map of pattern label → import-prefix list. A file matches a pattern when any of its imports starts with one of these prefixes.
_ignore_dirs: Folder names the indexer skips when this plugin is enabled (Python virtualenvs, build/cache dirs, etc.).
_ignore_files: Glob patterns for files the indexer should skip.
_ignore_dir_markers: Sentinel file names that mark an entire directory as ignorable (catches non-standard virtualenv layouts).
